channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: android/nowinandroid
item.description: A fully functional Android app built entirely with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose

item.title: square/okhttp
item.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: DD3Boh/OuterTune
item.description: A Material 3 Music Player with YouTube Music support for Android. Forked from InnerTune

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: futo-org/grayjay-android
item.description: Read-only mirror of Grayjay repo for issue tracking

item.title: kizitonwose/Calendar
item.description: A highly customizable calendar view and compose library for Android and Kotlin Multiplatform.

item.title: AkaneTan/Gramophone
item.description: A sane music player built with media3 and material design library that is following android's standard strictly.

item.title: javalin/javalin
item.description: A simple and modern Java and Kotlin web framework

item.title: JetBrains/ideavim
item.description: IdeaVim – A Vim engine for JetBrains IDEs

item.title: GradleUp/shadow
item.description: Gradle plugin to create fat/uber JARs, apply file transforms, and relocate packages for applications and libraries. Gradle version of Maven's Shade plugin.
